response.original_title: Cesar Menotti & Fabiano - Palavras de Amor Ao Vivo
response.overview: "Palavras de Amor — Ao Vivo" is the first live album by the sertanejo duo César Menotti & Fabiano, released in 2005 by Universal Music. The show was recorded at Café Cancún, in Belo Horizonte, on August 31 and September 1, 2005 by Flávio Senna, directed by Pinocchio (audio) and Santiago Ferraz (video). The album is considered one of the reasons for the change in sertanejo music, being the emergence of a new style, which would later be called Sertanejo Universitário.
response.title: Cesar Menotti & Fabiano - Words of Love Live
